'''âb-b-r-m''' ('''kababremoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photofission|photofission]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photofission|photofission]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-b-r-m
|-
! Lemma
| kababremoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibabremoko|thibabremoko]] || [[word:jibabremoko|jibabremoko]] || [[word:shibabremoko|shibabremoko]] || [[word:kibabremoko|kibabremoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubabremoko|thuthubabremoko]] || [[word:jujubabremoko|jujubabremoko]] || [[word:shushubabremoko|shushubabremoko]] || [[word:kukubabremoko|kukubabremoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubabremoko|thubabremoko]] || [[word:jubabremoko|jubabremoko]] || [[word:shubabremoko|shubabremoko]] || [[word:kubabremoko|kubabremoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubabremoko|thubabremoko]] || [[word:jubabremoko|jubabremoko]] || [[word:shubabremoko|shubabremoko]] || [[word:kubabremoko|kubabremoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebabremoko|thebabremoko]] || [[word:jebabremoko|jebabremoko]] || [[word:shebabremoko|shebabremoko]] || [[word:kebabremoko|kebabremoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobabremoko|thothobabremoko]] || [[word:jojobabremoko|jojobabremoko]] || [[word:shoshobabremoko|shoshobabremoko]] || [[word:kokobabremoko|kokobabremoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobabremoko|thobabremoko]] || [[word:jobabremoko|jobabremoko]] || [[word:shobabremoko|shobabremoko]] || [[word:kobabremoko|kobabremoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobabremoko|thobabremoko]] || [[word:jobabremoko|jobabremoko]] || [[word:shobabremoko|shobabremoko]] || [[word:kobabremoko|kobabremoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbabremoko|thĂŠbabremoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbabremoko|jĂŠbabremoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbabremoko|shĂŠbabremoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbabremoko|kĂŠbabremoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathababremoko|thathababremoko]] || [[word:jajababremoko|jajababremoko]] || [[word:shashababremoko|shashababremoko]] || [[word:kakababremoko|kakababremoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thababremoko|thababremoko]] || [[word:jababremoko|jababremoko]] || [[word:shababremoko|shababremoko]] || [[word:kababremoko|kababremoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thababremoko|thababremoko]] || [[word:jababremoko|jababremoko]] || [[word:shababremoko|shababremoko]] || [[word:kababremoko|kababremoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
